label: 🐾 Fun & Personality
description: Make your editor fun, unique, and expressive

extensions.name: VS Code Pets
extensions.description: Adds a little cat, dog, or rubber duck to your editor. They walk around while you code! 🐱

extensions.name: Background
extensions.description: Set a custom image or GIF as your VS Code background. Make it feel personal.

extensions.name: Discord Presence
extensions.description: Shows what file and project you are coding in your Discord status. Flex your work.

extensions.name: CodeSnap
extensions.description: Takes beautiful screenshots of your code with syntax highlighting. Perfect for sharing online.

extensions.name: Power Mode
extensions.description: Your code EXPLODES with particles and combo streaks as you type. 100% optional chaos.

extensions.name: SynthWave '84
extensions.description: Retro neon glow effect on your syntax highlighting. Makes your code look like a sci-fi movie.

extensions.name: Background Cover
extensions.description: Full-window background image support — set any photo as your editor wallpaper.
